arts.ttl: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca insists his side are 'serious and we want to compete' after 5-0 Carabao Cup rout of Barrow as the Blues boss calls on his side to 'send a message' to their rivals
arts.sum: A hat-trick from Christopher Nkunku, who has started only once in the Premier League, put League Two Barrow to the sword while there was a first Chelsea goal for Pedro Neto.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 5-0 Barrow: Player ratings as Blues breeze into Carabao Cup fourth round
arts.sum: The second came seven minutes later as Malo Gusto's low cross again found Nkunku for a delightful flick beyond Paul Farman in the Barrow goal. The momentum of the game continued into the second half and Neto tapped home an electric counter just two minutes after the restart following a smart cross from Mykhailo Mudryk.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans fume as Sky Sports camera cuts away at worst possible time in Barrow thrashing
arts.sum: Chelsea prevailed 5-0 to progress past League 2 side Barrow in the Carabao Cup with Christopher Nkunku stealing the headlines by recording a hat-trick at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca: We are men, we are serious and we want to compete
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku starred at Stamford Bridge with a hat-trick.

arts.ttl: Ben Chilwell sends 10-word message to cheering Chelsea fans after wearing captain's armband on his return from exile after the club failed to sell him
arts.sum: The left back missed Chelsea's final seven games of last season after injuring his knee during a 1-0 loss to Man City in April. Chelsea then tried to sell him over the summer but failed to find a buyer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea in talks with new front-of-shirt sponsorship as short-term deal emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea are in talks with Qatar Airways and two other major airlines regarding a front-of-shirt sponsorship deal, football.london understands. football.london understands that the club are in talks with Qatar Airways, who have sponsored Paris Saint-Germain and Barcelona in the past.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 5-0 Barrow: Enzo Maresca reveals pre-match message after EFL Cup demolition
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca reveals that he demanded that his heavily-rotated side send a message to their rivals in their 5-0 victory over Barrow on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: ‘We are serious’: Enzo Maresca shares what he told Chelsea players just before their 5-0 Carabao Cup win
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will likely have left Stamford Bridge pretty pleased with the night’s work as Chelsea booked their place in the next round of the...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca press conference LIVE - Chelsea boss on Nkunku hat-trick, Carabao Cup, Felix - football.london
arts.sum: Nkunku then scored his hat-trick in the second-half after he tackled Farman to give himself an open goal. Christopher Nkunku opened the scoring with a fine volley after being found beautifully by Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings vs Barrow as Nkunku, Felix and Neto all shine for Blues
arts.sum: Malo Gusto - Great work down the right-hand side to cross the ball into Nkunku's path for his second goal of the night. The 26-year-old flicked the ball past Farman expertly after being found by his countryman Malo Gusto on the right-hand side.
